summary: Backend refactor from server:app to main:app fully tested. All 22 API endpoints pass regression tests (100%). Fixed missing imports in settings router that caused /api/settings/status to fail with 500. Frontend verified: Login works, Dashboard shows 60 documents with correct stats, all navigation pages load correctly (Document Queue, Vendor Intelligence, Layout Families, Settings).

minor.issue: Returns 500 due to BC tenant auth config issue ('freight-resolver-lab' is not a valid tenant ID). This is expected per test request notes - NOT a refactoring bug.

issues: Minor React hydration warning in console about <tr> inside <span> - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: /app/backend/routers/settings.py was missing imports for GRAPH_CLIENT_ID, BC_CLIENT_ID, TENANT_ID, SHAREPOINT vars, FOLDER_MAP, ENABLE_CREATE_DRAFT_HEADER, DRAFT_CREATION_CONFIG, SECRET_KEYS, _mask, _current_config, get_graph_token, get_bc_token, get_email_watcher_config, subscribe_to_mailbox_notifications
All 22 refactored API endpoints return 200 with correct response structures
The refactor successfully splits the 10,000+ line server.py monolith into modular routers while maintaining full backward compatibility
BC companies endpoint 500 error is due to invalid tenant ID config in preview environment, not refactoring

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Login, Dashboard, Document Queue, Vendor Intel, Layout Families, Settings all verified)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing 60 documents in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactor complete and tested. main.py is the new entry point, server.py is used as a library module. All modular routers in /app/backend/routers/ are working. The settings.py router was fixed to import missing variables from server.py. BC Companies endpoint returns 500 due to invalid TENANT_ID='freight-resolver-lab' in .env - this is expected in preview environment.

verified_endpoints./api/auth/login: PASS - returns token and user info
verified_endpoints./api/documents: PASS - returns documents list with total count (60 documents)
verified_endpoints./api/dashboard/stats: PASS - returns total_documents, by_status, by_type breakdown
verified_endpoints./api/workflows/ap_invoice/status-counts: PASS - returns AP workflow status breakdown
verified_endpoints./api/layout-fingerprints/stats: PASS - returns family stats (0 families, 0 fingerprints)
verified_endpoints./api/settings/status: PASS - returns connection status (FIXED - was 500 before)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live. No mocked integrations.
